name: Potential XXE Exploitation Attempt In JVM Based Application
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Moti Harmats
SIGMA Title: Potential XXE Exploitation Attempt In JVM Based Application
SIGMA Description: Detects XML parsing issues, if the application expects to work with XML make sure that the parser is initialized safely.

False positives:
- If the application expects to work with XML there may be parsing issues that don't necessarily mean XXE.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%saxparseexception%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%domexception%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential XXE Exploitation Attempt In JVM Based Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%saxparseexception%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%domexception%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential XXE Exploitation Attempt In JVM Based Application
